popularStory.headline: Jeanne de Dammartin
popularStory.description: Jeanne de Dammartin, (v. 1220 † 16 mars 1279 Abbeville) fut comtesse d'Aumale de 1237 à 1279 et comtesse de Ponthieu de 1251 à 1279. Elle était fille de Simon de Dammartin, comte d'Aumale, et de Marie …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla於1220年6月24日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內達馬-素-迪奧時，她的父親Simon de Dammartin39歲，母親Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil21歲。她於1237年10月與Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯布爾戈斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1279年3月16日在法國皮卡迪索姆阿別維爾享年58歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆阿古勒斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla于1220年6月24日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內達馬-素-迪奧时，她的父亲Simon de Dammartin39岁，母亲Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil21岁。她于1237年10月与Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯布爾戈斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1279年3月16日在法国皮卡迪索姆阿別維爾享年58岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆阿古勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: "Juana"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Juan .  It is now also occasionally used in the English-speaking world, to which it was introduced mainly by Hispanic settlers in the United States.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla was born on 24 June 1220, in Dammartin-sur-Tigeaux, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Simon de Dammartin, was 39 and her mother, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, was 21. She married Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León in October 1237, in Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 16 March 1279, in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Argoules, Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla est née le 24 juin 1220, à Dammartin-sur-Tigeaux, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Simon de Dammartin, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León en octobre 1237, à Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1279, à Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Argoules, Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla am 24. Juni 1220 in Dammartin-sur-Tigeaux, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Dammartin 39 und ihre Mutter Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil 21. Sie hat im Oktober 1237 in Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. März 1279 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla è nata il il 24 giugno 1220 nel Dammartin-sur-Tigeaux, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Simon de Dammartin, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León nel ottobre 1237, nel Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 marzo 1279, nel Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castillaが1220年6月24日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンダンマルティン-スル-ティジェアウックスで生まれた時，父Simon de Dammartinは39歳，母Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuilは21歳であった。1237年10月にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスブルゴスブルゴスでFernando III Rey de Castilla y de Leónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1279年3月16日にフランスピカーディソンメアベヴィルで58歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメアルゴウレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla(이)가 1220년 6월 24일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 다마틴-수-티그이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Dammartin(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1237년 10월 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스 버고스에서 Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 3월 16일 프랑스 피카디 솜 애브베빌에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜 아굴스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla nasceu em 24 de junho de 1220, em Dammartin-sur-Tigeaux, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Simon de Dammartin, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León em outubro de 1237, em Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1279, em Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Argoules, Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla родилась 24 июня 1220 г. в местности даммартин-сур-тигокс, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon de Dammartin было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León октябрь 1237 г. в местности бургос, бургос, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 марта 1279 г. в местности эббевилл, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности аргоулесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León,: Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España
es.of Burgos, Burgos, Spain: Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Consort Jeanne "Juana" De Danmartin Reina Consorte de Castilla nació el 24 de junio de 1220, en Dammartin-sur-Tigeaux, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Simon de Dammartin, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Fernando III Rey de Castilla y de León en octubre de 1237, en Burgos, Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1279, en Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Argoules, Somme, Picardie, Francia.
